center.name: Thorn forest
center.summary: Thorn forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联22种鸟类，包括Lesser ground cuckoo、Tawny-collared nightjar、青绿阔嘴蜂鸟等22种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species inhabits a variety of landscapes including humid and dry broadleaf forests, Hispaniolan pine forests dominated by Pinus occidentalis, semi-arid scrubland, and thorn forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits arid lowland and montane scrub forest and thorn forest in the tropical and lower subtropical zones.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It primarily inhabits arid montane scrublands including thorn forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits arid scrublands and the edges of tropical thorn forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits several types of forests including thorn, tropical deciduous, lowland tropical evergreen, and the lower parts of humid montane forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits rather dry thorn forest, somewhat moister semi-deciduous forest, and humid foothill and montane forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: twomeyi inhabits arid scrub and thorn forest. Sources differ on its upper elevation range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species inhabits semiarid to arid landscapes including the interior and edges of woodlands, thorn forest, secondary forest, and savanna

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | pages =404–405 }} In northern Central America it also is found in thorn forest and in Costa Rica in more humid forest than further north. In elevation overall it ranges from sea level to though only to in Costa Rica

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Knopf | date =2003 | location =New York | pages =370 | isbn =0-679-45121-8 }} In Mexico it occurs in chaparral, thorn forest, shrubby abandoned fields, the edges and clearings of subtropical forest, and the understory of tropical deciduous forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It primarily inhabits arid scrublands, especially mesquite and thorn forest, and occasionally occurs in somewhat open over-grazed areas.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In migration and when overwintering it inhabits a greater variety, adding gallery forest, mangroves, plantations, evergreen forest, and thorn forest. In Belize, Guatemala, and Honduras it inhabits pine-oak forest and pine savanna. In its breeding range it is found at elevations between and in Mexico from sea level to . In Central America it mostly occurs above except in eastern Honduras where it is found at or below

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It primarily inhabits thorn forest and scrubby woodland and can be found in the understory of secondary forest and other heavy growth

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits arid to semiarid thorn forest, moister gallery forest, and swamp forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species inhabits a variety of arid to semi-humid landscapes in the upper tropical and subtropical zones including thorn forest, dry brushy woodlands, arid scrublands, and secondary forest.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits the Gran Chaco, Pampas, and Argentine Espinal ecoregions, where it occurs in woodlands, scrublands, thorn forest, and savanna

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits arid to semihumid landscapes including brushy woodland, thorn forest, and dense scrublands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits a variety of dry to moist low-stature landscapes including thorn forest and shrublands and brushy areas adjoining dry and deciduous forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In all seasons the species inhabits a variety of landscapes including the edges of tropical forest, deciduous woodlands, gallery forest, thorn forest, dryish scrublands, cerrado, plantations, gardens, and agricultural areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: corallirostris. The cinnamon hummingbird inhabits primary and secondary deciduous and semi-deciduous forests and thorn forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It ranges in Pacific-slope thorn forest from Jalisco, Mexico, to Northern Puntarenas, Costa Rica

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The turquoise-crowned hummingbird is found in the southern Mexican states of Guerrero, Oaxaca, and Chiapas. It inhabits a variety of landscapes including arid thorn, tropical deciduous, gallery, and secondary forests
